Bash(python -c "
import httpx
import json
import os

creds_path = os.path.expanduser\(''~/.claude/.credentials.json''\)
print\(f''Credentials path: {creds_path}''\)

with open\(creds_path\) as f:
    creds = json.load\(f\)

refresh_token = creds[''claudeAiOauth''][''refreshToken'']
client_id = ''9d1c250a-e61b-44d9-88ed-5944d1962f5e''

resp = httpx.post\(
    ''https://console.anthropic.com/v1/oauth/token'',
    data={
        ''grant_type'': ''refresh_token'',
        ''refresh_token'': refresh_token,
        ''client_id'': client_id,
    },
    timeout=15,
\)
print\(f''Status: {resp.status_code}''\)
print\(f''Response: {resp.text[:500]}''\)
")

from raunch.client import get_client

client = get_client\(\)

# Test with mild content first
try:
    result = client.chat\(
        system=''You are a helpful assistant.'',
        messages=[{''role'': ''user'', ''content'': ''Say hello''}],
        max_tokens=50
    \)
    print\(f''Basic test OK: {result[:50]}''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Basic test FAILED: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}''\)
""")

Bash(gh pr create --base main --head unstable --title "Streaming UX, director mode, and reliability fixes" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- **Director mode**: Manual tick control for step-by-step narrative progression
- **Streaming text**: Real-time character responses with smooth 250ms sync animation
- **Save reliability**: Fix Ctrl+C save \(signal manual_tick_event\), autosave every tick
- **OAuth handling**: Manual refresh command \(`r`\), handle token race conditions

## Changes
- `frontend/`: Streaming state management, skip re-render on finalize, UI polish
- `raunch/client.py`: Token refresh, re-read token before requests
- `raunch/orchestrator.py`: Manual tick mode, save fixes
- `raunch/main.py`: Add `r` command for token refresh

## Test plan
- [ ] Start backend, connect frontend
- [ ] Toggle director mode, advance with "Next Tick"
- [ ] Verify streaming text animates smoothly without jarring re-render
- [ ] Ctrl+C backend, verify save persists
- [ ] Test `r` command for manual token refresh

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
